narrative: I noticed a collection account on my credit report that does not belong to me. I have never had an account with this debt collector. I disputed the item with the credit bureau, but they verified it without giving me any documentation.

My credit card company charged me multiple late payment fees even though I have autopay set up for the full balance. The bank admits they can see my payment instruction but says the fee cannot be reversed due to their policy.

My mortgage servicer changed the address for mailed payments without notifying me. Two payments were returned and they reported me as 30 days late to the credit bureaus, even though I mailed the checks on time to the address listed on my statement.

A debt collector is calling me at work several times a day even after I told them my employer does not allow personal calls. They have contacted my family members about this debt and left detailed messages on shared voicemail.

My bank closed my checking account without any prior notice while my paycheck was pending. Automatic bill payments were returned, and I incurred multiple late fees with other companies. The bank will not explain why the account was closed.
